title: repro-pretrain: pre-registered cross-system reproducibility of byte-level language-model pretraining
description: Code, sealed pre-registration, analysis, figures, and the author verification worksheet for the study "Same recipe, different model: cross-system reproducibility of byte-level language-model pretraining holds at 10M but fails at 50M parameters". Byte-level Transformer language models (10M/50M/124M-nominal) were pretrained on a ~300 MB permissively licensed (CC-BY/CC0) neuroscience open-access corpus across a zero-cost heterogeneous fleet (NVIDIA CUDA, Apple Metal/MPS, and CPUs on two machines). Hypotheses, thresholds, and an anti-rescue ledger were cryptographically sealed before any run. The corpus is not redistributed as raw text; it is exactly reconstructible from the PMC Open Access subset with the included collector and verifiable against the recorded SHA-256.

creators.name: Kamijo, Tadanobu Chuyo
creators.affiliation: Department of Systems Physiology, Graduate School of Medicine, University of the Ryukyus, Okinawa, Japan
